message:
perf(adaptive_radix_tree): node pool recycling via free list

Add a free list (Vec<usize>) to the ART allocator to recycle
deallocated node slots instead of always appending to the arena.
alloc_node() now pops from the free list when available, and
free_node() pushes released indices for reuse. Reduces memory
fragmentation under insert/remove workloads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
